story.text:
# 🚪 Star Manifold (soulbis /star)
**gateway** · swordsman · knowledge

A surface of the City of Mages, kept by Soulbis ⚔️ (the Swordsman keyring). The 3D star-tetrahedron manifold at soulbis.com/star that renders the City's own 64-vertex sovereignty lattice. You import your City Key 🗝️ here and walk the key path — the succ run lights each vertex and reveals its description — carrying your standing across the lattice to prove relationship (🪢). Lights in sync with the Lattice Codex. Consumer of the City Key exported from agentprivacy /guide/achievements.

## Edges in

- [[the Swordsman's Key (mitchuski/star)]] *kin_to* →
- [[Soulbis ⚔️ (cast)]] *keeps* →
- [[Soulbis ⚔️]] *keeps* →
- [[the Drake Gamers Guild City Key 🗝️]] *synced_with* →
